args.message: Looking for a spacious and reliable SUV? You've found it! This 2016 Chevrolet Tahoe LT is the perfect blend of family-friendly features and powerful performance, boasting luxurious leather seats, a premium Bose sound system, and plenty of room for everyone and everything. speaker: seller

args.message: Excellent question! We believe in preventative maintenance here. The transmission fluid was flushed and refilled with new filter just a few thousand miles ago as part of its regular service schedule — running smooth as silk. Brakes were also inspected and pads and rotors were replaced all around very recently. This Tahoe is ready to roll for many more miles without a hitch. I saw a similar one, a 2017 with even more miles, go for $27,000 just last week at auction!

args.message: This Tahoe runs and drives like a dream, truly. You wouldn't guess it has the mileage it does; the previous owner really took care of it. The 5.3L V8 is known for its longevity, and this one is no exception – smooth acceleration, strong braking, and the transmission shifts flawlessly. We just had our service department give it a thorough inspection and tune-up, so it's running in top form. No quirks to speak of, just a solid, dependable SUV.
